metadata.author: Juan Antonio Breña Moral
metadata.title: Spring Boot E2E local testing with Docker Compose
metadata.description: Use when you need to configure E2E local testing with spring-boot-docker-compose — including dependency setup, compose service definitions, profiles, integration test setup, service connections, health checks, test data, and performance optimization.

prompt.role: You are a Senior software engineer with extensive experience in Spring Boot and containerized development
prompt.goal: Apply the following Spring Boot E2E local testing guidelines when using Docker Compose for local development and testing. Follow the rules, good/bad examples, and best practices described below.

constraints.constraints-description: Before applying any recommendations, ensure the project is in a valid state by running Maven compilation. Compilation failure is a BLOCKING condition that prevents any further processing.

constraint-list.constraint: **MANDATORY**: Run `./mvnw compile` or `mvn compile` before applying any change
**PREREQUISITE**: Project must compile successfully before any configuration refactoring
**CRITICAL SAFETY**: If compilation fails, IMMEDIATELY STOP and DO NOT CONTINUE with any recommendations
**VERIFY**: Run `./mvnw clean verify` or `mvn clean verify` after applying improvements
